profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Capitol Nusantara Indonesia Tbk engages in the shipping business in Indonesia. The company offers domestic shipping, shipping agency, transportation, and oil and gas shipping services, as well as rents out vessels. It also operates anchor handling tugs, tugboats, floating cranes, barges, and heavy equipment. PT Capitol Nusantara Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
